_comment: Scale-ladder smoke baselines (docs/07 Phase 2 exit demo, session 2.4 CU3). Produced by deploy/smoke.py: gate -> solve -> retrieve -> one what-if over the API. Timings are WALL-CLOCK and ENVIRONMENT-SPECIFIC (host below); a regression reference point, not a hard CI gate. Re-run on a target instance to compare. Deterministic solve (server PYTHONHASHSEED=0).

environment.where: local uvicorn (no container; Docker unavailable in-session), single-worker deterministic solve
